changelog:
• Fixed persistent Chordex -> Hub return black screen issue via deterministic failsafe.
• Resolved GSAP target missing console warning.
• Improved diagnostics and trace logging.
whatsNew:
• Fixed persistent Chordex -> Hub return black screen issue via deterministic failsafe.
• Resolved GSAP target missing console warning.

added: Added deterministic key-based Hub remount recovery failsafe when Hub root is missing.
fixed: Fixed Chordex -> Hub return black screen by resolving false-positive and actual transition blocks.
Resolved GSAP target not found warning in StudioTitleReveal component.
